title: GORGE YOUTH MENTORING - 211info
text: NEXT DOOR GORGE YOUTH MENTORING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Recruits, screens, trains, and supports adult volunteer mentors for children and teens. Mentors offer friendship and support with the goal of helping youth perform better in school and making them less likely to use drugs or turn to violence to solve problems. BBBS matches mentors with youth in their own community. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Ages 7-14 can be matched with an adult mentor Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 490-9979 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 386-6665 Main phone Main phone (541) 490-9979 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River, Klickitat, and Wasco Counties Services: Mentoring Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - HEALTH PROMOTION AND CHRONIC DISEASE PREVENTION EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - SUMMER CAMPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTH PROMOTION SERVICES/NUESTRA COMUNIDAD SANA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MID-COLUMBIA HEALTH EQUITY ADVOCATES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH FAMILY SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TREATMENT SERVICES SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COLUMBIA GORGE PRIDE ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEXT DOOR
